overview: A modern, high-conversion real estate website for THE PROPKING REALTY, a trusted consultancy in Ahmedabad, Gujarat. Features a curated property listings grid, investment opportunities, client testimonials, a 5-step consultation process, lead capture forms, and a mobile-optimized experience — all built around a clean brand identity of deep blue and golden yellow.
features: Hero section with stats and dual CTAs
12-15 demo property listings with filters (budget, location, type)
Tabbed lead capture form (Get Deals / Book Visit / Talk to Expert)
Floating WhatsApp button + sticky header CTA
Mobile sticky bottom bar (Call / WhatsApp / Properties)
SEO meta tags and schema markup
